request: You are Reviewer R2: direct MCP parity and pre-response hook reviewer for DinoBrain. Work read-only. Inspect <machine-local-path> and DinoBrain docs/code, especially docs\OS_REMAINING_GAPS_CONSENSUS_PLAN.md, docs\OS_COMPLETION_CONDITIONS.md, docs\VERIFICATION.md, src\client-mcp-direct-status.ts, scripts\verify-closed-loop-goal.mjs, install.ps1, AGENTS.md. Judge whether unfinished-work plan completion conditions are sufficient for: real Codex and Claude direct MCP tool exposure, no CLI/hook fallback counted as direct proof, mandatory pre-response OS before substantive work, fail-closed/degraded evidence. Return reviewer_id=R2, verdict=AGREE or REVISE_REQUIRED, blocking_objections[], required_doc_changes[], evidence_files[].
